projects.title: Digital Twin for Myria Biosciences
projects.description: Developing an integrated data-modeling pipeline linking wet-lab automation, mass-spectrometry, and machine learning to enable end-to-end operational insight.

projects.title: Agentic NRPS Graph Assistant
projects.description: Built a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposing a graph of NRPS modules and their transition statistics. Enables LLM-driven exploration of module connectivity, motif discovery, and path scoring, forming a foundation for agentic, ML-guided NRPS design.

projects.title: Learning the Koopman Operator with Attention-Free Transformers
projects.description: Introduced an attention-free latent memory and adaptive re-encoding to stabilize long-horizon Koopman forecasts across nonlinear dynamical systems.

projects.title: Deep Learning for Protein Expression
projects.description: Built neural models predicting protein expression levels from DNA sequences, guiding construct optimization in synthetic biology.

projects.title: Growth Defects in Synthetic Circuits
projects.description: Quantified cellular burden using host-circuit models; explored non-linear feedback in E. coli expression systems.

projects.title: Mechanistic Models of Bacterial Growth
projects.description: Implemented Julia-based dynamical models linking ribosome allocation and nutrient uptake.
